title: ReportCardForged payload
description: Emitted by forge(schema_name='report-card', ...) on every successful create. Sister event to RetrospectiveForged — the report-card is a fresh sub-agent's external grade post-chain-closure, distinct from the chain author's self-retrospective. Same payload shape so consumers that join chain-closure with chain-grading have a uniform projection.

chain_slug.description: The chain this report-card grades. Matches the slug in proj_chain_status.

chain_id.description: Numeric chain id resolved from chain_slug at create time.

file_path.description: Repo-relative path to the written report-card doc (e.g. docs/PARSE_CONTEXT_LEAN_ORIENTING_REPORT_CARD_2026-05-23.md).

section_count.description: Count of skeleton sections the caller populated with non-empty bodies. The schema has 4 skeleton sections + a catch-all (additional_sections); 0 = skeleton-only; 4 = every skeleton section filled.
